title: ShuiShui's Little Seed
subtitle: 水水和爸爸一起种下第一颗花生种子
theme: 植物生长、亲子陪伴、耐心与责任
moral: 小种子需要每天细心照顾，做事情也要慢慢来、坚持做。

pages.narration: 一大早，爸爸去了花卉市场。他挑呀挑，想给水水找一个最可爱的花盆。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 这个圆圆的兔子花盆，水水一定会喜欢！

pages.composition_hint: A red panda standing in an outdoor flower market, holding up with both paws a COMPLETELY EMPTY round white rabbit-shaped ceramic flower pot with one pair of tall upright ears. The pot is brand new and totally empty — no soil, no flowers, no plants, no leaves inside, just a clean hollow empty pot. Flower stalls in the background.

pages.narration: 到了幼儿园，水水一眼就看见了兔子花盆。圆圆的花盆上，有一对高高的兔耳朵。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 哇，它像我一样有长耳朵！

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 今天，它要陪我们种小种子。

pages.composition_hint: At a kindergarten entrance, the red panda papa holds a COMPLETELY EMPTY round white rabbit-shaped ceramic pot with tall ears (empty hollow pot, nothing inside — no soil, no flowers, no plants), shuishui (white bunny in pink dress) reaching up to touch it, bright morning.

pages.narration: 教室里热热闹闹。大家带来了各种各样的花盆：方的、圆的、高的、矮的。
pages.composition_hint: shuishui looking at many different shaped flower pots on classroom tables, papa standing nearby, various animal classmates and animal characters in the background.

pages.narration: 有一只灰山羊也带来了花盆。那个花盆超级大，像一个小桶！大家都笑了。
pages.composition_hint: Bright classroom. On the LEFT, a tall GRAY GOAT parent (gray fur, horns, goat face) hugs an oversized bucket-sized empty terracotta plant pot with both arms. On the RIGHT, shuishui (white bunny) and her red panda papa stand together EMPTY-HANDED, laughing and pointing at the goat's huge pot. Other animal classmates around. The big pot belongs to the goat, the red panda is NOT holding any pot.

pages.narration: 王老师请大家坐好。她说，小种子会先睡在土里，再慢慢发芽、长叶，长大。

dialogue.speaker: 王老师
dialogue.text: 今天，我们要种的种子是——花生！

pages.composition_hint: Classroom lesson. At the FRONT stands the teacher: a friendly GIANT PANDA teacher (black-and-white panda, NO glasses) pointing at picture cards showing seed→sprout→leaves→tall plant. In the FOREGROUND shuishui (white bunny) and red panda papa are SEATED together at a low table as listeners, looking up at the panda teacher. The panda teacher is the one teaching at the front; the red panda papa is only a seated parent in the audience.

pages.narration: 刘老师又教大家：先放土，再放种子，盖一层土，最后浇半杯水。

dialogue.speaker: 刘老师
dialogue.text: 小手轻轻的，种子会很舒服。

pages.composition_hint: Planting demonstration. The teacher is a tall GIRAFFE (long neck, NO glasses) bending down at the front table, demonstrating with peanut seeds, dark soil and a small watering cup. shuishui (white bunny) watches closely; red panda papa sits beside her as a listener. The giraffe teacher is doing the demonstrating, NOT the red panda.

pages.narration: 每个小朋友分到两颗花生种子。三个人一组，共用一个装满土的泡沫箱和一桶水。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 这两颗小小的，是我的花生宝宝。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui holding two peanut seeds in her paws at a classroom table, a white foam box filled with dark soil and a small water bucket nearby, papa standing with her.

pages.narration: 爸爸和水水一起往兔子花盆里填土。土软软的，像一床小被子。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 我们给种子铺一张舒服的小床。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui and papa adding dark soil from a white foam box into a round rabbit-shaped flower pot with tall ears on a classroom table, animal classmates working at nearby tables.

pages.narration: 水水把两颗花生放进土里，又盖上一层薄薄的土。最后，她给种子浇了半杯水。
pages.composition_hint: shuishui pouring water from a small cup into the round rabbit-shaped flower pot with tall ears, papa watching, dark soil visible inside the pot.

pages.narration: 活动结束后，水水洗了小手，又和爸爸一起吃了晚饭。兔子花盆安安静静地等在一边。

scene_state.location: 幼儿园洗手区和餐桌旁

pages.composition_hint: At a kindergarten dining table, ONLY shuishui (white bunny in pink dress) is eating her own small dinner from a plate with a spoon. The red panda papa sits beside her with NO food in front of him, just smiling and keeping her company (papa is not eating, only shuishui eats). A clean empty rabbit-shaped pot with plain soil sits on a side table.

pages.narration: 回到家，水水把兔子花盆放在窗边。她每天都来看一看。
pages.composition_hint: At home by a living-room windowsill, shuishui (white bunny, pink dress) places a rabbit-shaped pot that holds ONLY flat brown soil — absolutely nothing has grown, NO flowers, NO sprout, NO green at all (it was just planted today). Her mama (an adult white rabbit in a yellow floral dress) and her red panda papa both stand beside her looking warmly at the plain soil pot. Cozy home, a calendar on the wall.

pages.narration: 可是，过了好几天，土还是平平的，什么也没有冒出来。水水有一点点着急。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 爸爸，它是不是不想长大？

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 小种子需要时间，也需要我们每天照顾。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui looking at the flat soil inside the round rabbit-shaped flower pot with tall ears on the windowsill, papa standing beside the window with a small water cup.

pages.narration: 水水看着还没发芽的兔子花盆，想了想。明天、后天、大后天，她都要记得给小花生喝水。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 我会慢慢等，也会好好照顾你。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui gazing at the round rabbit-shaped flower pot with tall ears on a sunny windowsill, flat dark soil inside, a small water cup beside the pot.
